element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each weapon has dual-fire mechanics to learn
Available on maps as pickups during advancing difficulty
Resource management and positioning around pickups
Strategic pickup timing against higher-skilled opponents
Navigation hazards and combat arena boundaries
Optional rule modifications for skill development

typical_relief_triggers: Winning individual matches and advancing tournament bracket
typical_tension_triggers: Low health status without nearby pickups
Approaching final tournament matches against Xan Kriegor
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Match-based intensity with escalating difficulty through tournament progression; acute tension peaks during individual skirmishes, strategic relief between rounds

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Mutators and practice mode available for skill building before competitive tournament

difficulty_curve.early_game: Initial tournament matches with lower-skilled bots; basic combat mechanics and map familiarization
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progression through tournament ladder with medium-difficulty opponents; introduction of advanced weapon mechanics and tactical positioning
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final matches against Xan Kriegor and elite-tier bots; mastery of all weapons, map control, and high-speed combat required
notable_spikes: Championship match against Xan Kriegor (tournament final)
Transition to team-based modes requiring bot coordination orders

notable_level_patterns.description: Enclosed arenas with weapon and item pickups distributed across space; emphasis on fast-paced mutual combat with clear sightlines and movement corridors
Maps themed across multiple settings (spaceships, outposts, castles, monasteries) with distinct visual identities; water and lava obstacles introduce spatial hazards
Sequential objectives attackers must complete; defenders hold positions; role reversal creates dual-phase structure and strategic depth

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Flag control points (Capture the Flag / Domination)
notable_level_patterns.description: Multiple control zones requiring team coordination; three-point standard layout encourages split positioning and team tactics
